final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing photorealistic employee ID badge design for ByteDance (字节跳动), showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product shot, corporate ID badge
Composition: two badge panels side by side — left panel showing front face, right panel showing back face — on a neutral surface
Subject: ByteDance (字节跳动) employee ID badge, front and back; front side includes company logo area, employee photo placeholder, name field, department field, employee ID number field; back side includes barcode or QR code area, company address or policy text area, magnetic stripe or chip detail
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral light background, badge lying flat or slightly elevated
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light, subtle shadow beneath badge to convey physical depth and realism
Color palette: corporate white and black base with ByteDance brand accent colors (orange-red tones)
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface, printed ink texture, lanyard hole at top, realistic card edge thickness visible
Text (verbatim): 字节跳动
Constraints: both front and back sides must be clearly visible and legible; badge proportions must match standard CR80 card (85.6mm × 54mm)
Avoid: cartoon or flat illustration style, blurry text, generic placeholder badge with no brand identity
